name: online-courses-platform
description: Professional Online Course Platform using TypeScript, Express, and SQLite

scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run watch:backend" "npm run watch:frontend" "nodemon --watch backend/dist backend/dist/server.js"
scripts.dev:estudiante: concurrently "npm run watch:backend" "npm run watch:frontend" "nodemon --watch backend/dist backend/dist/server-estudiante.js"
scripts.dev:profesor: concurrently "npm run watch:backend" "npm run watch:frontend" "nodemon --watch backend/dist backend/dist/server-profesor.js"
scripts.dev:admin: concurrently "npm run watch:backend" "npm run watch:frontend" "nodemon --watch backend/dist backend/dist/server-admin.js"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run watch:backend" "npm run watch:frontend" "nodemon --watch backend/dist backend/dist/server.js" "nodemon --watch backend/dist backend/dist/server-estudiante.js" "nodemon --watch backend/dist backend/dist/server-profesor.js" "nodemon --watch backend/dist backend/dist/server-admin.js"
